title: synaedrys hystrix
side_effects: Synaedrys hystrix can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing severe allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing. Prolonged exposure to the plant's extracts can also cause gastrointestinal problems, including nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, the plant's toxins can affect the central nervous system, leading to dizziness, confusion, and even loss of consciousness. If ingested, Synaedrys hystrix can cause kidney damage and may lead to long-term health complications if not treated promptly.
